texto: If age someday grounds my feet and wilts my port de bras, what vestige of the old life will be left? The signs that I was a dancer will gradually fade like stripes on a beach towel. Even my knowledge of the art form, reaped in sweat over decades, could be lost over time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sascha Radetsky: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “If age someday grounds my feet and wilts my port de bras, what vestige of the old life will be le…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, vida, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de time e art.
